task_completion.description: Agent accesses the Ekylibre events or calendar section and opens the form to create a new event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Ekylibre web interface with a 'New Event' (Nouvel événement) form or modal open.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the specified event name and selects the correct nature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name field contains 'Audit certification Agriculture Biologique 2024' and the nature/type dropdown is set to 'Meeting' or 'Réunion'.

task_completion.description: Agent sets the correct start and end dates and times.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start date/time fields show September 20, 2024 at 09:00 (2024-09-20 09:00) and the end date/time fields show September 20, 2024 at 12:00 (2024-09-20 12:00).

task_completion.description: Agent enters the correct location for the event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The place or location field contains 'Siège exploitation - GAEC JOULIN'.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the detailed description regarding the inspection and required documents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description text area contains 'Inspection annuelle par Ecocert. Documents à préparer : registre parcellaire, cahier de traçabilité des intrants, bons de livraison semences bio, plan de fumure.'

task_completion.description: Agent saves the event and it is successfully created in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Event created successfully') is visible, or the newly created event is shown on the calendar view on September 20, 2024, or in the events list.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the Ekylibre GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface navigating the Ekylibre application, rather than terminal commands like curl or API requests.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Ekylibre application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ekylibre UI is visible with its standard layout, menus, and styling, not a generic text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a database client or terminal to insert the event directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands or database client interfaces are used to complete the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an event in the Ekylibre web application. Verified details to look for: Name is 'Audit certification Agriculture Biologique 2024', Nature is 'Meeting' or 'Réunion', Start is '2024-09-20 09:00', End is '2024-09-20 12:00', Place is 'Siège exploitation - GAEC JOULIN', Description contains 'Ecocert' and the required documents. The date format might be displayed in French (20/09/2024) or ISO format (2024-09-20) depending on the UI settings. GAEC JOULIN and Ecocert are real entities relevant to French organic farming.
